problem id: 3376d8b7
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) AND NOT ROT(1)

examples:
  00110001 -> 10011000
  00101000 -> 00000100
  01100111 -> 00110001
  00111011 -> 10001001
  01010100 -> 00000010
  01001010 -> 00100001
  01011000 -> 00001100
  00101011 -> 10000001

query: 01000100
predicted answer: 00100010
